description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named FISCO-BCOS GitHub Actions that triggers on push to all branches except those matching **-1.3 or **-1.5, tags except v1.*, and paths except docs/**, Changelog.md, and README.md. Also trigger on pull requests to those paths and on release events. The workflow should have a build job running on a matrix of ubuntu-18.04 and macOS, and several integration test jobs on macOS, ubuntu-16.04, and ubuntu-20.04. Each job should check out the code, install dependencies, configure, compile, and run tests.
